kits.title: Helios Pro - Premium Next.js Admin Dashboard UI Kit
kits.summary: Premium Next.js 16 admin UI kit with 137 pages, 28 reusable components, dark mode, theme customizer, command palette, ecommerce, SaaS, analytics, and app dashboards.
kits.description: Helios Pro is a premium Next.js admin dashboard UI kit for SaaS, ecommerce, CRM, analytics, support, finance, and internal tools. It includes a large dashboard page set, reusable interface components, dark mode, theme customization, command palette navigation, responsive layouts, polished charts, data tables, forms, app screens, auth screens, and marketing pages. The preview runs in demo mode so buyers can inspect the product before purchase, and the package is ready to customize for production products.
kits.seoTitle: Helios Pro - Premium Next.js Admin Dashboard UI Kit
kits.metaDescription: Helios Pro is a premium Next.js admin dashboard UI kit with 137 pages, reusable components, dark mode, theme customizer, command palette, ecommerce, SaaS, and analytics screens.
features: 137 unique pages across 11 categories - no duplicated layouts
Original Helios Pro brand identity (emerald + amber
Light & dark mode with smooth transitions via next-themes
Global command palette (Ctrl/Cmd+K) with fuzzy search across all 137 routes
Real-time metrics page with live-updating chart and number tickers
Permission matrix (roles x modules with view/create/edit/delete toggles)
Demo mode: runs without database or auth backend - defensive stubs in lib/db
Real SVG icons only - no emojis (60+ icons in sidebar icon set)
Server/Client component split pattern (page.tsx metadata wrapper + _client.tsx for interactivity)

kits.title: Lumiere Premium Ecommerce Platform Template
kits.summary: A complete, production-ready premium ecommerce platform with a React + Vite customer storefront, a secure admin dashboard, cart, wishlist, checkout, mock payments, coupons, reviews, and a built-in standalone mock API - no backend required for live preview.
kits.description: Lumiere is a complete, production-ready ecommerce platform built with React + Vite (client) and Express + MongoDB (server, optional). The client runs fully standalone thanks to a built-in mock API layer that serves 21 realistic products across 6 categories, complete with reviews, coupons, orders, and admin data - all persisted to localStorage. Features include a premium customer storefront (home, shop with filters/sort/pagination, category pages with FAQ schema, product detail with gallery/variants/reviews, cart drawer, wishlist drawer, checkout, order success, account section with orders/addresses/settings, auth, 9 static pages, 404/500 error pages), a full admin dashboard (revenue charts, product/category/order/customer/coupon/review/inventory/message/subscriber/settings management), JWT auth with role-based access, SEO with JSON-LD schemas, a warm premium design system with light/dark mode, and full responsiveness. Ships with demo data and credentials for instant exploration.
kits.seoTitle: React Ecommerce Template with Admin Dashboard | Lumiere Ecommerce
kits.metaDescription: Download Lumiere, a premium React ecommerce template with storefront, admin dashboard, cart, wishlist, checkout, coupons, reviews, mock payments, and demo data.
includedPages: Account Profile / Orders / Order Detail / Addresses / Settings
About / Contact / FAQ / Shipping Policy / Returns / Privacy / Terms / Size Guide / Track Order
features: Standalone mock API - no backend required for live preview
21 realistic products with Unsplash images across 6 categories
JWT auth with role-based access (CUSTOMER / ADMIN) and httpOnly cookie support
and coupon validation (when backend is used)
Cart drawer with free-shipping progress bar and coupon validation
Quick view modal with variant selection
Search overlay with live suggestions and popular searches
Premium navbar with mega menu and scroll-aware sticky header
Premium design system: Fraunces (display) + Plus Jakarta Sans (body)
Fully responsive (mobile / tablet / desktop) with mobile filter drawers and sticky bottom CTAs
Vercel-ready with SPA routing config and asset cache headers
Optional Express + MongoDB backend with full REST API (60+ endpoints)
Optional real MongoDB support via MONGODB_URI env var
Optional real payment provider support (Stripe/Razorpay/PayPal) via env vars
Optional real email support via SMTP env var
useCases: Production ecommerce storefront for a premium lifestyle brand
Admin dashboard template for managing products
Standalone portfolio/showcase piece - runs in browser with no backend
Starting point for a fullstack React + Express + MongoDB ecommerce app
Learning resource for React + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind patterns
Mockup/wireframe for client presentations - fully interactive
Hackathon or MVP starting point - deploy to Vercel in under 60 seconds

kits.title: MTVerse Modular AI SaaS Next.js Dashboard Template
kits.summary: Modular Next.js admin dashboard template for AI SaaS, ecommerce, CRM, analytics, finance, logistics, marketing, sales, stocks, and reusable dashboard components.
kits.description: Built from the real mt-modular suite source. This package is organized as a modular dashboard system with reusable shell primitives, dashboard navigation, premium cards, lazy charts, lazy maps, AI generator screens, ecommerce flows, CRM sections, and domain dashboards. It is positioned for developers who want a flexible Next.js admin kit they can extend feature by feature.
kits.seoTitle: MTVerse Modular AI SaaS Next.js Dashboard Template | Admin UI Kit
kits.metaDescription: Download MTVerse Modular, an AI SaaS Next.js dashboard template for ecommerce, CRM, analytics, finance, logistics, marketing, sales, stocks, charts, maps, and admin apps.
features: Modular dashboard shell with header, sidebar, command palette, theme provider, and shared dashboard primitives.
AI product screens for workspace, chat, image generation, video generation, code generation, API usage, and settings.
Ecommerce modules for product management, product detail, billing, invoices, transactions, and single-record views.
CRM modules for account health, pipeline board, renewal risk, lead radar, timeline, follow-ups, meeting schedule, drawers, and contacts table.
Real chart and map foundations with Recharts, ApexCharts, D3 Geo, TopoJSON, lazy chart loading, and lazy map loading.
Source-organized component library covering advanced UI, forms, tables, overlays, navigation, communication, media, feedback, and utilities.

kits.title: MT Box Enterprise Next.js SaaS Admin Dashboard Template
kits.summary: Enterprise Next.js SaaS admin dashboard template with analytics, business apps, RBAC, billing, API keys, audit logs, settings, auth pages, and UI systems.

This package focuses on enterprise SaaS back offices: organization settings, team management, billing, integrations, API keys, security, RBAC, audit logs, activity logs, notifications, help, FAQ, pricing, business apps, auth flows, and reusable UI screens.
kits.seoTitle: MT Box Enterprise Next.js SaaS Admin Dashboard Template | B2B UI Kit
kits.metaDescription: Download MT Box Enterprise, a Next.js SaaS admin dashboard template with analytics, RBAC, billing, API keys, audit logs, auth pages, and business app screens.
includedPages: Auth sign in and sign up
features: Enterprise workspace screens for billing, settings, security, RBAC, API keys, integrations, audit logs, activity logs, team, profile, notifications, changelog, help, FAQ, and pricing.
Domain dashboard coverage for analytics, ecommerce, CRM, finance, HR, logistics, marketing, projects, SaaS, sales, support, and AI workspace.
Business app surfaces for AI assistant, calendar, chat, CRM pipeline, email, file manager, invoice, kanban, notes, tasks, and team workspace.
UI library pages for accordions, command palette, forms, inputs, tables, charts, maps, modals, drawers, popovers, loaders, media gallery, file upload, search, tabs, and timeline.
Auth coverage for sign in, sign up, forgot password, reset password, OTP, two-factor, lock screen, sessions, maintenance, and coming soon pages.
Reusable MT Box primitives for sidebar, topbar, logo, navigation spinner, command palette, theme toggle, providers, and chart components.

kits.title: Mat Dash Next.js Admin Dashboard Template
kits.summary: Large Next.js admin dashboard template with modern, minimal, and analytics dashboards, ecommerce apps, invoices, tickets, notes, blog, tables, charts, and auth variants.
kits.description: Built from the real mat-dash suite source. This package is the broadest admin studio in the set, with a full App Router structure, dashboards, ecommerce screens, invoice flows, tickets, notes, blog, chat, email, calendar, kanban, contacts, table examples, icon pages, UI components, auth layouts, and front-site sections.
kits.seoTitle: Mat Dash Next.js Admin Dashboard Template | React Tailwind UI Kit
kits.metaDescription: Download Mat Dash, a Next.js admin dashboard template with analytics dashboards, ecommerce apps, invoices, tickets, notes, blog, tables, charts, auth pages, and UI components.
features: Three dashboard modes with revenue forecast, product revenue, total income, new customers, daily activity, and blog card widgets.
App screens for ecommerce, invoices, tickets, notes, blog, chat, email, calendar, kanban, contacts, and user profile workflows.
Table library with basic, dense, editable, filtering, sorting, pagination, row selection, column visibility, drag-drop, expanding, sticky, striped, and hover examples.
Auth layouts for login, register, forgot password, two-step verification, and side-auth variants.
Reusable UI layer based on Radix primitives, Tabler icons, ApexCharts, TanStack Table, Tailwind CSS, theme provider, loaders, and global search.
Large route inventory with 140 route pages and 380 packaged source/config files after excluding local build caches and dependencies.
